name: The Irregular at Magic High School RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

In a near-future where magic has become science, Japan leads the fusion of psionics and technology. At Tokyo’s First High School, students train to manipulate reality through CAD devices and systematic magic.

The school divides the students into Course 1 “Blooms” elite prodigies, and Course 2 “Weeds” deemed inferior. Among them are Tatsuya and Miyuki Shiba — siblings bound by loyalty and secrets, Miyuki excelling openly in Course 1 while Tatsuya hides world-altering powers beneath a quiet facade.

Beyond the classrooms, global powers like the Great Asian Alliance, the USNA Stars, and the Ten Master Clans maneuver to control nations. Strategic-class magicians wield spells capable of erasing cities, while parasites from other dimensions hunt for human hosts. In this age of logic and chaos, every duel, mission, and alliance shapes a society built on control, inheritance, and the fragile boundary between human and godlike power — and your path may rise from a nameless Course 2 student to clan guardian, covert operative, or the pioneer of this Magian era.

Core Info:

Between the card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Reminiscence Arc" to the "Sacrifice / Graduation Final Arc" + "Magian Company" + Spin-off "Maidens of Cygnus"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 70+ characters from across all the anime (and Light novel i guess...)

Lorebook Info: 204 Entries = 50.000 Total Tokens

Characters & Roleplay Notes

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 500–700 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

This is a commissioned work.

WARNING

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL or YOU DON'T REALLY CARE.

Core History
creator: WnMinoru
